channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: White House criticizes Mark Hamill's social media post about Trump
item.description: A recent social media post by actor Mark Hamill, known for his role in Star Wars, sparked a sharp response from the White House. Hamill shared content related to the grave of former President Donald T...

item.title: US-Iran tensions flare with brief clashes despite ongoing ceasefire talks
item.description: United States aur Iran ke darmiyan phir se jharrap hui, jo un ke darmiyan chalne wale ek mahine ke ceasefire ke liye ab tak ka sab se bara imtihan samjha ja raha hai. Dono taraf se firing aur military...

item.title: Axing of Inland Rail project threatens jobs and economic growth in regional Australia
item.description: Regional communities in western New South Wales and Queensland are facing significant economic setbacks following the cancellation of the $45 billion Inland Rail project, which was intended to run fro...

item.title: South African Women Delegation Strengthens Trade and Investment Ties in Tunisia
item.description: A delegation of South African women led by the Africa Progressive Women Chamber for Trade and Industry recently participated in the ninth edition of the Financing Investment and Trade in Africa Confer...

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka aims to play representing Belarus following IOC decision
item.description: Belarusian tennis star Aryna Sabalenka has expressed her hope to continue competing under the Belarus flag after a recent ruling by the International Olympic Committee (IOC). The IOC had previously im...

item.title: FG validates national protocols to conserve and monitor Nigeria’s livestock breeds
item.description: The federal government of Nigeria don validate one set of harmonised national protocols wey go help conserve, characterise, and monitor the country's Animal Genetic Resources (AnGR). According to the ...

item.title: Future of Oxford’s Ultimate Picture Palace uncertain due to lease dispute
item.description: The Ultimate Picture Palace (UPP), one of the United Kingdom’s oldest independent cinemas, is facing an uncertain future after Oriel College, its landlord, refused to extend its lease. Opened in 1911 ...

item.title: Promoting Understanding and Cooperation Between India and Pakistan
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing ideological and socio-economic divide between India and Pakistan, emphasising the need for peace. It highlights how young populations on both sides are being drawn in...

item.title: Weekly Fuel Price Update: Gasoline Up, Diesel Down Amid Economic Pressures
item.description: Fuel prices in the Philippines are showing a mixed trend for the upcoming week. Gasoline prices are expected to increase while diesel prices are trending lower. The national average for diesel is repo...

item.title: Canadian health‑tech firm PointClickCare draws up U.S. relocation plan amid trade‑war fears
item.description: Canadian technology firm PointClickCare Technologies Inc., a major homegrown health‑tech company, has developed a contingency plan to move its headquarters and key operations to the United States if U...

item.title: Paralyzed Subway Victim Speaks at Attacker's Sentencing After 2023 Assault
item.description: In a harrowing case in New York City, Emine Yilmaz Ozsoy, who was left paralyzed from the shoulders down after being shoved into a moving subway train in May 2023, confronted her attacker, Kamal Semra...

item.title: Supreme Court Hears Bohra Woman on Legal Status of Female Genital Mutilation
item.description: In a significant hearing at the Supreme Court of India, a Dawoodi Bohra woman has raised concerns regarding the practice of female genital mutilation (FGM). Represented by senior advocate Sidharth Lut...

item.title: ASEAN Leaders Gather in Cebu; Philippines Facilitates Cambodia-Thailand Border Talks
item.description: On May 7, 2026, Cebu became the hub for important ASEAN activities ahead of the 48th ASEAN Summit scheduled for May 8. The day saw foreign and economic ministers from Southeast Asian countries conveni...

item.title: Key Issues Expected in Trump-Xi China Talks Next Week
item.description: Donald Trump is set to visit China next week, making him the first US president to go there in nearly ten years. The talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping are taking place amid an uneasy trade truce...

item.title: Cyberattack on Canvas disrupts coursework at California colleges during finals
item.description: A major cybersecurity breach at Instructure, the company behind Canvas, a widely used learning management system, caused widespread disruption at colleges and universities across California and nation...

item.title: Seven Arrested in Kisumu for Exhuming Woman's Body Amid Land Dispute
item.description: In Kisumu, seven people were arrested for exhuming the body of a woman who had been murdered a month earlier. The incident took place in Kolwa West, Kanyakwar, on May 6, reportedly without any legal p...

item.title: How Gamification Is Changing Casino Loyalty Programs
item.description: Casino loyalty don dey change as gamification dey reshape how players relate to platforms. Before now, loyalty simply mean make player spend, earn points, and dey enjoy perks based on wetin dem don wa...

item.title: Critique of Anti-Intellectualism and Leadership Standards in Philippine Politics
item.description: The opinion piece argues that Philippine politics is increasingly shaped by anti-intellectualism, where incompetence is framed as relatability and even admired by the public. It focuses on Vice Presid...

item.title: Senator Karen Nyamu Apologises for Unacceptable Remarks to Visiting Student
item.description: Nominated Senator Karen Nyamu found herself in hot water after making remarks deemed inappropriate towards a Grade 10 student who was visiting the Senate under the School Volunteer Scheme. The inciden...

item.title: English teams secure spots in all three major European football finals this season
item.description: For the first time in football history, English clubs have reached the finals of all three major European competitions in the same season. Arsenal secured their place in the Champions League final aft...
